# Angel One Support — Sarthana Jakatnaka, Surat

> Authorised local support center for Angel One related demat account opening, KYC, mobile trading, and IPO applications. Located at 313, Rise On Plaza, Sarthana Jakatnaka, Surat, Gujarat. Guidance available in Gujarati.

## What we do

- Angel One demat account opening support in Sarthana Jakatnaka, Surat
- Trading account setup and mobile trading (Angel One app) guidance
- KYC document verification (PAN, Aadhaar, bank proof)
- IPO application help and long-term investment guidance
- Beginner-friendly stock market guidance in Gujarati

- Business name: Angel One Support — Sarthana Jakatnaka

## Disclaimer

We are an authorised sub broker (Authorised Person) of Angel One Limited. We are not Angel One Limited itself. Investment decisions should be made at your own discretion.
